title: Mcards
description: Adds a lot of  cards that have magical powers
body:
introduces a unique deck of magical cards with special abilities to enhance your gameplay. These cards are single-use items that offer strategic advantages in various situations. The mod features different types of cards, each providing unique effects to aid players in combat, exploration, and survival. Discover and collect powerful cards to unleash their potential!

**Spell Cards** are activated instantly by the player, providing immediate effects. These cards allow players to cast spells or gain temporary boosts, offering quick solutions in combat or exploration.

**Trap Cards** activate automatically under specific conditions while they are in your inventory. These cards are designed to provide protection or buffs at critical moments, often when the player's health is low or when certain enemies are nearby.

**Summon Cards** allow players to bring various entities into the game world. The summoned entities can assist in combat or change the dynamics of encounters. These cards add an extra layer of strategy, as the summoned creatures can sometimes be unpredictable.

**Totem Cards** activate upon the player's death, providing a last-chance ability to either revive or exact retribution on nearby enemies. These cards can turn a fatal situation into an opportunity for recovery or vengeance.

**World Cards** impact the environment directly, allowing players to modify the weather, terrain, or structures around them. These powerful cards provide large-scale effects that can shape the world to the player's advantage.

**Permanent Cards** are cards that can be used more than one time .
